notes: Recent-change focus: v8.11.79 AI stream guard and frontend raw tool-call fallback behavior.

The first strict fullscreen assertion used a markdown prefix and returned false, but direct page text verification confirmed the second question, answer, and analysis basis were present in /dashboard/ai-assistant.
Second AI response latency was 18797ms via Mistral; this stayed below the 30s user-visible threshold and did not expose raw JSON or an empty response.
Mode audit: both AI jobs resolved multi via analysis_mode_thinking; no raw tool-call JSON was persisted in job results.
